en_title: Subnautica 2 Hotfix Modifies Creature Behavior Further So Some Predators Will Attack Players Less Often
cn_title: 《深海迷航2》热修复：部分掠食者攻击性降低
subtitle: 打不过就改AI
opus_summary: 《深海迷航2》开发商Unknown Worlds发布第三次热修复，调整生物行为以回应玩家无法杀死掠食者的抱怨。例如锤头鲨不再攻击无人驾驶的Tadpoles，Nibblers的感知范围缩小。游戏自5月14日抢先体验以来已售出400万份，Steam峰值在线超46.7万。发行商Krafton据称同意支付2.5亿美元(约合人民币18亿元)激励金。

paragraphs.en: Subnautica 2 developer Unknown Worlds has released the game’s third hotfix since early access launch, this time modifying the behavior of creatures in response to complaints about not being able to kill predators.
paragraphs.cn: 《深海迷航2》开发商Unknown Worlds发布了抢先体验以来的第三次热修复，本次调整了生物行为，以回应玩家关于无法杀死掠食者的抱怨。

paragraphs.en: Not being able to directly kill fish in Subnautica 2 is the game’s hottest topic, and while Unknown Worlds has promised to add “mitigation” to the game so you can better deal with predators , it will never allow you to kill them.
paragraphs.cn: 无法直接杀死鱼类是《深海迷航2》目前最热门的话题。虽然Unknown Worlds承诺会加入「缓解」手段，让玩家更好地应对掠食者，但绝不会允许玩家杀死它们。

paragraphs.en: So, rather than add combat to Subnautica 2 or give death-dealing weapons to players, Unknown Worlds is changing the way predators work. This hotfix is a part of that. For example, Hammerheads no longer attack unpiloted Tadpoles, although they can still take an interest in Tadpoles generally. And while the overall damage of Marrowbreaches is increased, their attacks are now spaced out to occur less frequently. As for Nibblers, their perception range is reduced so players are less visible to them, and the duration Nibblers circle the player before attacking is increased. Patch notes courtesy of Steam are below.
paragraphs.cn: 因此，Unknown Worlds没有为《深海迷航2》加入战斗系统或致命武器，而是改变掠食者的行为方式。本次热修复就是其中一部分。例如，锤头鲨不再攻击无人驾驶的Tadpoles（不过它们仍可能对Tadpoles产生兴趣）。Marrowbreaches的总体伤害提高了，但攻击间隔拉长，频率降低。至于Nibblers，它们的感知范围缩小了，玩家更难被发现，而且它们在攻击前环绕玩家的时间也变长了。以下是Steam上的更新说明。

paragraphs.en: The hotfix is well-timed. Just yesterday, we reported on comments from Subnautica 2 design lead Anthony Gallegos , who explained the developers’ true intent in ditching combat for the sequel. A narrative has emerged that Unknown Worlds actually set out to create a “pacifism game.” That, Gallegos told MinnMax in a fascinating new interview about the design of Subnautica 2 , just isn’t true.
paragraphs.cn: 这次热修复来得正是时候。就在昨天，我们报道了《深海迷航2》设计主管Anthony Gallegos的评论，他解释了开发团队在续作中放弃战斗的真正意图。外界有一种说法认为Unknown Worlds实际上想做一款「和平主义游戏」。但Gallegos在接受MinnMax关于《深海迷航2》设计的新采访时表示，这并非事实。

paragraphs.en: Unknown Worlds has been open about its plans to add ways for players to mitigate the threat of predators in Subnautica 2 via updates. But Gallegos said the developers also plan to add creature flinches so players actually realise when they’re bonking fish on the face with the hammer. The update released this week appears to have added a change that reflects this ("Increased sensitivity of the Nibblers to the Multitool").
paragraphs.cn: Unknown Worlds一直公开表示计划通过更新为玩家增加缓解掠食者威胁的手段。但Gallegos表示，开发团队还计划加入生物受击反应，让玩家能切实感受到用锤子砸到鱼脸的效果。本周发布的更新似乎已经加入了相关改动（「提高了Nibblers对多功能工具的敏感度」）。

paragraphs.en: While the killing fish debate rages on, Subnautica 2 is a clear success. It has sold a huge 4 million copies since its early access launch on May 14, achieving more than 467,000 peak concurrent players on Steam — success Gallegos said took the team by surprise. Subnautica 2 has sold so well that publisher Krafton has reportedly agreed to pay a $250 million earnout to the developers — a bonus that was at the heart of its high-profile legal dispute with the fired Unknown Worlds leadership.
paragraphs.cn: 在杀鱼争论愈演愈烈的同时，《深海迷航2》显然取得了成功。自5月14日抢先体验上线以来，该作已售出400万份，Steam最高同时在线玩家数超过46.7万——Gallegos表示这一成功让团队始料未及。《深海迷航2》销量如此之好，以至于发行商Krafton据称同意向开发商支付2.5亿美元(约合人民币18亿元)的激励金——这笔奖金正是其与被解雇的Unknown Worlds领导层之间备受瞩目的法律纠纷的核心。

paragraphs.en: If you’re getting to grips with Subnautica 2, we’ve got a Things to Do First in Subnautica 2 guide to check out before you dive in, plus resource location guides to help you find Titanium , Silver , and more. Discover blackbox and supply crate locations on our interactive Subnautica 2 map , and make sure you don’t miss any Angel Comb Adaptations or Blueprints .
paragraphs.cn: 如果你正在上手《深海迷航2》，我们有一份《深海迷航2》优先事项指南供你在潜入前查阅，还有资源位置指南帮你找到钛、银等材料。在我们的《深海迷航2》互动地图上探索黑匣子和补给箱位置，确保你不会错过任何天使梳适应或蓝图。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
paragraphs.cn: Wesley是IGN新闻总监。你可以在Twitter上通过@wyp100找到他。联系方式：wesley_yinpoole@ign.com，或保密邮箱wyp100@proton.me。
